bug:
Thank you for reporting this issue.

Our support team has been notified and will review your bug report shortly.

**To help us resolve this faster, please ensure your report includes:**
- Clear steps to reproduce the issue
- Expected vs. actual behavior
- Environment details (OS, browser, wallet version)
- Screenshots or error messages

**Need immediate assistance?**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

We appreciate your patience.
security:
Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

This security report has been flagged as **high priority** and our security team will investigate immediately.

**IMPORTANT:**
- Please do not disclose vulnerability details publicly
- For critical security issues, contact our team directly
- We take security seriously and respond promptly

**Contact our security team:**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

Your responsible disclosure helps protect our community. Thank you.
help:
Thank you for reaching out.

Our support team has received your question and will respond soon.

**While you wait:**
- Check our documentation for common solutions
- Search for similar previously answered questions
- Our community is here to help

**Need assistance?**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

We appreciate your patience.
transaction:
Thank you for reporting this transaction issue.

Our support team will investigate and respond shortly.

**Please provide the following information:**
- Transaction hash (TX hash)
- Blockchain/Network (e.g., Ethereum, BSC, Polygon)
- Amount and tokens involved
- Transaction timestamp
- Screenshots of any errors

**Contact us:**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

This information will help us investigate faster. Thank you.
wallet:
Thank you for reporting this wallet issue.

Our support team has been notified and will review your case shortly.

**Important reminders:**
- Never share your private keys or seed phrase
- Ensure you're using the official wallet version
- Try clearing cache or refreshing the application

**For balance issues:**
- Verify the correct network is selected
- Check the contract address for custom tokens
- Allow time for blockchain confirmations (12-30 blocks)

**Need assistance?**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

Thank you for your patience.
contract:
Thank you for reporting this smart contract issue.

Our development team will review and respond shortly.

**Please provide:**
- Contract address
- Network/Blockchain
- Relevant code snippets (if applicable)
- Compiler version and settings
- Gas estimates and actual gas used

**Contact our team:**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

We appreciate your detailed report.
gas:
Thank you for reporting this gas fee issue.

Our support team will review and respond shortly.

**Helpful resources:**
- Check current gas prices: [Etherscan Gas Tracker](https://etherscan.io/gastracker)
- Try transactions during off-peak hours for lower fees
- Adjust gas limit if transactions are failing
- Consider Layer 2 solutions for reduced costs

**Need assistance?**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

Thank you for your patience.
token:
Thank you for reporting this token issue.

Our support team has been notified and will respond shortly.

**Please provide:**
- Token contract address
- Token ID (for NFTs)
- Network/Blockchain
- Token symbol and name
- Screenshots of the issue

**Common solutions:**
- Add custom tokens manually using the contract address
- Refresh metadata for NFTs
- Verify you're connected to the correct network

**Contact us:**
- [Support Portal](https://gitdapps-auth.web.app)
- Email: Git_response@proton.me

We appreciate your patience.
